title: Harvard Growth Lab Atlas — Complexity Rankings & Growth Projections (country-level)
source_org: Harvard Growth Lab, Harvard Kennedy School
units: index values (ECI, growth projection); see column descriptions in GraphQL schema / Atlas glossary
license_terms: Harvard Dataverse, DOI 10.7910/DVN/XTAQMC — cite per Atlas citation guidelines
notes: Harvard Atlas 'Data Downloads' page (atlas.hks.harvard.edu/data-downloads) is a client-rendered React app; the actual catalog of ~71 downloadable tables (with DOI, Dataverse file ID, and exact file size for each) is served via POST to https://atlas.hks.harvard.edu/api/graphql with query '{ downloadsTable { displayName doi dvFileId dvFileName dvFileSize productLevel tableDataType tableName repo yearMin yearMax } }'. Actual files are then fetched from Harvard Dataverse at https://dataverse.harvard.edu/api/access/datafile/<dvFileId>. This dataset (country_id x year, no product breakdown) is a country-level aggregate, well under the 500MB cap.
